_comment: MCP servers this plugin needs; install-plugin merges these into the project's MCP config.
'playwright' is the web capture driver (also shipped in the framework MCP template; merge is idempotent).
'visual-qa' is the local 'eyes' server: shared/eyes.py materializes into ai/visual-qa/eyes.py on install,
so the command path is project-root-relative. It reads VISUAL_QA_ENDPOINT / VISUAL_QA_MODEL from env;
install-plugin writes the chosen endpoint/model into ai/memory/resources.md - set the env to match the
GPU box serving the model (default http://localhost:8000/v1, Qwen/Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct).
